draft_prompts.data_discovery: Locate the NOAA dataset with historical acres burned data from January 2000 onwards and assess its quality for analysis.
draft_prompts.data_wrangler: Clean and preprocess the extracted data from the NOAA dataset to extract the total acres burned for each month since January 2000.
draft_prompts.analyst: Perform statistical analysis on the preprocessed data to identify the three-month period with the highest total acres burned since January 2000, along with the total acres burned during this period.
draft_prompts.reporter: Compile the results from the analysis into a clear, concise report detailing the three-month period with the highest total acres burned since January 2000 and the corresponding total acres burned.
